sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9057" key="a)nisodu/namos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσο-δύνᾰμος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9057.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of unequal strength,</tr_> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:p.103C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.103C.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
